content:
# Safaniya Member

**Summary**: A Middle Cretaceous carbonate and clastic unit in the Wasia Formation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997]] studied the Safaniya Member, specifically focusing on the SFNC sequence within it.

- [[2013-atig|atig, 2013]] analyzed the safaniya-member to determine the best modeling approach for its sand bodies.

## Depositional Environment

- [[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997]] deltaic systems (fluvial, delta front, and marginal marine)

- [[2013-atig|atig, 2013]] analyzed the safaniya-member to determine the best modeling approach for its sand bodies.

## Reservoir Properties

- [[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997]] Heterogeneous characteristics.

## Diagenetic History



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The member is characterized by a series of deltaic progradational cycles. ([[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997, p. 24]])

- The member is divided into nine sequence stratigraphic zones with varying facies distributions. ([[2013-atig|atig, 2013, p. 46]])
